tools.name: createBoard
tools.description: Create a new kanban board with a name and optional description.

tools.name: listBoards
tools.description: List all boards for the organization with card and column counts.

tools.name: deleteBoard
tools.description: Soft-delete a board and all its columns and cards.

tools.name: addColumn
tools.description: Add a new column to a board with a name and optional WIP limit.

tools.name: reorderColumns
tools.description: Reorder columns on a board by providing the new column ID sequence.

tools.name: deleteColumn
tools.description: Delete a column from a board. Cards in the column must be moved first.

tools.name: createCard
tools.description: Create a new card in a specific column with title, description, and priority.

tools.name: moveCard
tools.description: Move a card to a different column or position within the same column.

tools.name: assignCard
tools.description: Assign a card to a user or unassign it.

tools.name: addCardComment
tools.description: Add a comment to a card.

tools.name: getCardActivity
tools.description: Get the activity log for a card including moves, comments, and assignments.

tools.name: filterCards
tools.description: Filter cards on a board by priority, assignee, label, or due date range.

tools.name: searchCards
tools.description: Full-text search across all cards in all boards.

tools.name: getCardsByAssignee
tools.description: Get all cards assigned to a specific user across all boards.
